inputs.label: Fabric Width (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Standard industrial fabric roll width, typically 150-320 cm for apparel and upholstery.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard industrial fabric roll width, typically 150-320 cm for apparel and upholstery.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart endüstriyel kumaş rulo genişliği, giyim ve döşemelik için tipik olarak 150-320 cm.

inputs.label: Fabric Length (m)
inputs.businessContext: Total length of fabric roll or batch, used to compute total area.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of fabric roll or batch, used to compute total area.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kumaş rulosu veya partisinin toplam uzunluğu, toplam alanı hesaplamak için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Pattern Length (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Length of one garment or component pattern piece along the grain.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of one garment or component pattern piece along the grain.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir giysi veya bileşen kalıp parçasının damar yönü boyunca uzunluğu.

inputs.label: Pattern Width (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Width of one pattern piece perpendicular to the grain.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of one pattern piece perpendicular to the grain.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir kalıp parçasının damar yönüne dik genişliği.

inputs.label: Quantity to Cut
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical pieces to be cut from the fabric.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical pieces to be cut from the fabric.

inputs.label: Cutting Method
inputs.businessContext: Method affects material utilization and labor cost. Single-ply is manual; multi-ply is automated.

businessContext_i18n.en: Method affects material utilization and labor cost. Single-ply is manual; multi-ply is automated.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yöntem, malzeme kullanımını ve işçilik maliyetini etkiler. Tek kat manuel, çok kat otomatiktir.

inputs.label: Material Cost per m²
inputs.businessContext: Cost of fabric per square meter, used for financial loss calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of fabric per square meter, used for financial loss calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metrekare başına kumaş maliyeti, finansal kayıp hesaplamaları için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage of cutting operator, used for labor cost estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage of cutting operator, used for labor cost estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim operatörünün saatlik ücreti, işçilik maliyeti tahmini için kullanılır.

rules.message: Pattern width must not exceed fabric width.
Quantity must be greater than zero.
Multi-ply cutting is recommended for quantities of 10 or more.

thresholds.message: Waste exceeds 15% – review nesting or pattern layout.
Material cost exceeds 10,000 currency units – consider alternative fabric.
Fabric utilization below 70% – optimize nesting or reduce allowance.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
